name: Wild Rice Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can condensed cream of mushroom soup (10 3/4 oz)
2 packages wild rice and long grain converted rice (7 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a crock pot.
2. Stir thoroughly to mix everything evenly.
3. Cover the crock pot and cook on low setting for 6 to 10 hours, or on high setting for 2 to 3 1/2 hours.
